goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to identify available administrative folders and public records
Search for specific governance or administrative document types
Review the contents of relevant administrative files
Create or update a governance document or record

user_agent_config.personality: Detail-oriented and committed to transparency, prefers systematic review of administrative processes
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced in public administration but unfamiliar with technical workspace tools

end_condition: The magistrate has successfully explored the workspace, located relevant governance documents, reviewed them, and created or updated a necessary administrative record
